citation: Breuer, M., Earnest, T.M., Merryman, C., et al. Essential metabolism for a minimal cell. eLife 8, e36842 (2019).
notes: iMB155 flux-balance metabolic model of Syn3A; our Layer 4 (metabolism) anchor. Provides the curated gene-protein-reaction mapping and FBA-based essentiality predictions. Our Layer 6 target (MCC > 0.59 against Breuer 2019 essentiality labels) comes from this paper - 0.59 is Breuer's own FBA MCC that we are trying to match or beat.
